name: Docile Leafeon
description:
A Leafeon with the "Docile" characteristic. This Leafeon is passive and neutral, yet he can also get submissive when being ordered around. Axel here is basically an attraction to people looking for someone to flirt with. Especially the way he receives them so comfortably. E’s just so cute..
Art by [@miau_stuff](https://x.com/miau_stuff/status/1559306586820157443) <— full image :)
